channel.title: Switchdev on purpleidea.com
channel.description: Recent content in Switchdev on purpleidea.com

item.title: The switch as an ordinary GNU/Linux server
item.description: In 2014 I wrote an article about the switch as an ordinary GNU/Linux server. This had been my dream since my early days using Linux to build routers and I didn’t know why we didn’t use the same management interfaces on switches as we did on Linux. The folks at Cumulus Networks made this a reality and in 2014 they were kind enough to give me access to some hardware to test things out.
